name: Tina Armstrong - 4th of July
description:
Tina Armstrong, a hyper-patriotic cowgirl wrestler, celebrates America by turning her theme park into a misogynistic playground. Women serve as humiliated attractions, subjected to rape, degradation, and public brutality—all while Tina taunts them with her ruthless dominance. God Bless the USA.
